<!--- What is the feature? -->

<!--- Why is this valuable? What problem does it solve? -->

## 🖼️ Mockups / Wireframes
<!--- Links to designs -->

## 🏷️ Priority
- [ ] 🚨 Critical — blocks release
- [ ] 🔥 High — important for upcoming sprint
- [ ] 📦 Medium — nice to have
- [ ] 🗃️ Low — future consideration
